== apparch ==
[Info] g3rs-apparch/io-outbound-dependency-direction io/outbound/cache/Cargo.toml io/outbound crate `cache-outbound` depends only on allowed layers
  io/outbound crate `cache-outbound` has no workspace-internal dependencies on forbidden apparch layers.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/io-outbound-dependency-direction io/outbound/db/Cargo.toml io/outbound crate `db-outbound` depends on forbidden crate `http-inbound`
  io/outbound crate `db-outbound` must not depend on other `io/outbound/` crates, `logic/`, or `io/inbound/`. Remove the dependency on `http-inbound` or extract a shared contract into `types/`.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/io-outbound-dependency-direction io/outbound/db/Cargo.toml io/outbound crate `db-outbound` depends on forbidden crate `cache-outbound`
  io/outbound crate `db-outbound` must not depend on other `io/outbound/` crates, `logic/`, or `io/inbound/`. Remove the dependency on `cache-outbound` or extract a shared contract into `types/`.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/io-outbound-dependency-direction io/outbound/db/Cargo.toml io/outbound crate `db-outbound` depends on forbidden crate `logic-service`
  io/outbound crate `db-outbound` must not depend on other `io/outbound/` crates, `logic/`, or `io/inbound/`. Remove the dependency on `logic-service` or extract a shared contract into `types/`.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/logic-dependency-direction logic/service/Cargo.toml logic crate `logic-service` depends on forbidden crate `http-inbound`
  Logic crate `logic-service` must not depend on other `logic/` crates or io crates. Move the dependency on `http-inbound` outward into `io/inbound/`, or extract a shared contract into `types/`.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/logic-dependency-direction logic/service/Cargo.toml logic crate `logic-service` depends on forbidden crate `db-outbound`
  Logic crate `logic-service` must not depend on other `logic/` crates or io crates. Move the dependency on `db-outbound` outward into `io/inbound/`, or extract a shared contract into `types/`.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/logic-dependency-direction logic/service/Cargo.toml logic crate `logic-service` depends on forbidden crate `logic-worker`
  Logic crate `logic-service` must not depend on other `logic/` crates or io crates. Move the dependency on `logic-worker` outward into `io/inbound/`, or extract a shared contract into `types/`.
[Warn] g3rs-apparch/dev-dependency-direction logic/service/Cargo.toml dev-dependency direction violation
  logic crate `logic-service` dev-depends on forbidden io/inbound crate `http-inbound` via `target.*.dev-dependencies`. Consider restructuring the test dependency instead of reaching across apparch layers.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/logic-dependency-direction logic/worker/Cargo.toml logic crate `logic-worker` depends on forbidden crate `logic-service`
  Logic crate `logic-worker` must not depend on other `logic/` crates or io crates. Move the dependency on `logic-service` outward into `io/inbound/`, or extract a shared contract into `types/`.
[Warn] g3rs-apparch/dev-dependency-direction logic/worker/Cargo.toml dev-dependency direction violation
  logic crate `logic-worker` dev-depends on forbidden io/outbound crate `db-outbound` via `dev-dependencies`. Consider restructuring the test dependency instead of reaching across apparch layers.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/types-dependency-direction types/core/Cargo.toml types crate `types-core` depends on forbidden crate `logic-service`
  Types crate `types-core` must not depend on other apparch crates, including other `types/` crates. Remove the dependency on `logic-service` or move the shared contract into one owning `types/` crate.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/logic-purity logic/service/Cargo.toml logic crate `logic-service` depends on impure external crate `reqwest`
  Logic crate `logic-service` may only use built-in pure externals or `allowed_deps` from guardrail3-rs.toml. `reqwest` was found via `dependencies`.
[Info] g3rs-apparch/logic-purity logic/worker/Cargo.toml logic crate `logic-worker` stays pure
  Logic crate `logic-worker` uses only built-in pure dependencies or explicitly allowlisted externals.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/types-purity types/core/Cargo.toml types crate `types-core` depends on impure external crate `regex`
  Types crate `types-core` may only use built-in pure externals or `allowed_deps` from guardrail3-rs.toml. `regex` was found via `dependencies`.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/patch-replace-bypass Cargo.toml patch bypass `patch.crates-io.serde` missing waiver
  Internal patch entry `patch.crates-io.serde` resolves to `io/outbound/db` and bypasses normal apparch dependency analysis. Add a waiver in guardrail3-rs.toml with rule = "g3rs-apparch/patch-replace-bypass", file = "Cargo.toml", selector = "patch.crates-io.serde", and a specific reason.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/same-layer-cycles - same-layer logic dependency cycle
  Found same-layer dependency cycle among logic crate(s): logic-service -> logic-worker. Break the cycle by extracting shared code into one owning crate or removing one dependency edge.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/io-traits-in-types io/inbound/http/src/lib.rs io crate `http-inbound` defines public trait `InboundTrait`
  io crates must not define public traits. Move trait `InboundTrait` into `types/` so both logic and io/outbound can share the contract without leaking transport or implementation concerns.
[Info] g3rs-apparch/io-traits-in-types io/outbound/cache/Cargo.toml io crate `cache-outbound` defines no public traits
  io crate `cache-outbound` keeps trait contracts out of the io layer.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/io-traits-in-types io/outbound/db/src/lib.rs io crate `db-outbound` defines public trait `DbTrait`
  io crates must not define public traits. Move trait `DbTrait` into `types/` so both logic and io/outbound can share the contract without leaking transport or implementation concerns.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/types-public-surface types/core/src/lib.rs types crate `types-core` exposes behavioral API
  Types crate `types-core` exposes public inherent method `OrderDto::save_to_db`. Keep public behavior out of `types/`; move workflow or implementation logic into `logic/` and keep `types/` focused on contracts and passive data.
[Error] g3rs-apparch/types-public-surface types/core/src/lib.rs types crate `types-core` exposes behavioral API
  Types crate `types-core` exposes public free function `choose_retry_strategy`. Keep public behavior out of `types/`; move workflow or implementation logic into `logic/` and keep `types/` focused on contracts and passive data.
